framework.name: Payment Network Convergence on Agent Commerce
framework.description: Multiple major payment networks (Visa, Mastercard, PayPal) and platforms (Amazon) are simultaneously building agent commerce capabilities, suggesting industry-wide belief that AI agents will become primary transaction initiators.
framework.raw_quote: Mastercard Agent Pay. Mastercard's similar technology allows AI agents to shop online for consumer staples AI shopping agent. PayPal's offering enables AI powered shopping experiences. Amazon's Buy Forme.
